title: Build Capability
description: Declaration by a creative agent that it can produce manifests conforming to a canonical format with specific parameter narrowing and required inputs. Buyers discover capabilities via the `creative_build_capabilities` field on `get_adcp_capabilities` responses, then call `build_creative` against the matching capability_id with the declared inputs. Structurally a ProductFormatDeclaration narrowing minus the sales-agent-product wrapping — the schemas converge.

capability_id.description: Identifier for this specific build capability within the creative agent (e.g., 'audiostack_audio_30s', 'the_daily_host_read_production', 'midjourney_image_landscape').

description.description: Detailed description of what this capability produces and how.

narrowing.description: Parameter narrowing of the target canonical (dimensions, duration, codec ranges). Use the same shape as ProductFormatDeclaration; the canonical key MUST match `target_format`.

inputs.description: Typed input vocabulary the capability consumes. Each key is a build_creative input name (creative_brief, scenes, voice_id, style_reference, script, starter_assets, product_feed, brand, offering_ref). Values describe whether each input is required and any constraints (max_chars, allowed_voices, etc.).

production_window_business_days.description: Typical production turnaround in business days. 0 for synchronous (e.g., generative AI); >0 for human-produced (e.g., podcast host-read).

digest.description: SHA-256 content digest of this capability definition. Drives BuildCapabilityRef caching.

creative_brief.description: Talking points and brand context for the synthesized audio.

voice_id.description: Voice selection from AudioStack's voice library. Defaults to brand voice if absent.

script.description: Verbatim script the host will read. Exact wording — no improvisation; legal pre-cleared.
